nodes.name: 雉科
nodes.summary: 雉科（Phasianidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联179种鸟类，如Udzungwa forest partridge、銹紅林鷓鴣、冠鷓鴣等179种鸟类。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 喜马拉雅山脉
nodes.summary: 喜马拉雅山脉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联124种鸟类，包括斑头雁、琵嘴鸭、雪鹑等124种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 棕尾虹雉
nodes.summary: 棕尾虹雉（Himalayan monal，学名 Lophophorus impejanus），分类上属于鸡形目，并归入雉科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于喜马拉雅山脉，常见栖息地包括峡谷峭壁，主要威胁包括非法猎捕。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸡形目
nodes.summary: 鸡形目（Galliformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联298种鸟类，如眼斑冢雉、Red-billed brushturkey、Black-billed brushturkey等298种鸟类。

nodes.name: 峡谷峭壁
nodes.summary: 大型猛禽和食腐鸟偏好的高崖栖息环境。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Himalayan monal (Lophophorus impejanus), also called Impeyan monal, is a landfowl native to Himalayan forests and shrublands at elevations of

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The Himalayan monal's native range extends from Afghanistan and Pakistan through the Himalayas in Nepal, India, southern Tibet and Bhutan. In Pakistan, it is common in the Khyber Pakhtunkhwa province and has also been recorded in Kaghan, Palas Valley and Azad Kashmir. In India, it has been recorded throughout the Indian Himalayan Region from Jammu and Kashmir to Arunachal Pradesh. It lives in upper temperate oak-conifer forests interspersed with open grassy slopes, cliffs and alpine meadows between , where it is most common between

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: thumb|left|Himalayan monal eggs collection in Museum Wiesbaden In some areas, the Himalayan monal is threatened due to poaching and other anthropogenic factors
